positive: A minimalist and stylized portrait of a mythical forest creature, perhaps a gentle spirit fox or a celestial deer, standing majestically amidst glowing bioluminescent flora. The composition should be centered, using clean, strong silhouettes against a vibrant, deep indigo and emerald green color palette. The creature should have flowing, ethereal lines and an aura of serene mystery. The background flora should create repeating, symmetrical patterns that are highly visible when printed. Stylize the artwork in a detailed, yet vector-like illustration style, reminiscent of Art Nouveau meets modern graphic design. Use dramatic rim lighting on the subject to enhance its silhouette. Highly detailed, tattoo flash quality, suitable for direct apparel printing.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, dirty, grain, amateur, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, jpeg compression
